title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) – Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI introduced a timeline for declaring wilful defaulters after NPA classification. It ensures faster identification and strengthens credit discipline.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks – Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) – Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
